reviews.comment:
Cómo coordinador que bajo 50 pasajeros a qué consuman de todo, y además cargamos combustible, ni el agua caliente para los choferes, una vergüenza , además el trato de las dos empleadas de turno 20:00hs mal llevadas con los pasajeros ,... Besitos bye pase ojalá nunca tenga que parar de nuevo aca

(Translated by Google)
As a coordinator, I had 50 passengers drop off and have them consume everything, and on top of that, we refueled. There wasn't even hot water for the drivers—it was a disgrace. Furthermore, the two employees on duty at 8:00 PM were rude to the passengers... Kisses, bye. I hope I never have to stop here again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlcG9lU3V3RRAB
